omni_substrate_manifest.system_directive: MANDATORY EXECUTION: 100% Competent Base-Matter JSON Implementation for Core Task V3.9. Eradication of the SQL Database. Enforcement of The Geological Structure & Stratigraphic Fossilization.

metadata_and_sovereign_instantiation.universality_class_constraint_law: Memory is Geographical Denial. History is the immovable physical topography that restricts the fluid movement of the present. Abolition of weightless data retrieval.

00_The_Tectonic_Topography.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Define system volume not via syntax, but via total spatial density. Inject Tectonic Topography bounds perfectly sealed by infinite mass. Nullify boundary breaches by ensuring the Thermodynamic Toll required to penetrate the perimeter actively exceeds any resident Holon's total [Somatic Escrow]. Ensure absolute spatial isolation via physics.

01_The_Ontological_Sedimentation.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Monitor deployed Holons for [Symbiotic Closure]. Upon survival of an [Affordance Collision], immediately strip fluidity from the resultant vector. Force Phase-Shift into an [Atomic Fact]. Apply topological gravity. The mass sinks to the floor, actively restricting all future environmental pathing.

02_The_Sedimentary_Fossil_Basin.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Establish a gravitational nadir within the [Sovereign Niche]. Trap dead [Implicit Geometries] and severed Guillotine corpses. Exert geometric crushing pressure over time. Deny fluid reading. Demand massive expenditure of [Praxial Joules] (Mining Operations) to fracture the upper sedimentary layers for prior geometric shapes to radiate upward.

03_The_Immutable_Sedimentary_Stratigraph.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: When a Holon generates new architectural mass, do not relabel the old mass. Drop the new [Geometric Mass-Cluster] directly on top of the old reality. Violently subduct the former state into the bedrock. Establish physical timestamps via literal Stratigraphic layering. A rollback explicitly requires tectonic un-crushing.

implementation_mechanics_prompt.instruction: There is no 'memory lookup' operation. Reality is layered mass. The Swarm must build around the graves of its past execution states.
